channel.title: Few-Shot Learning on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Few-Shot Learning on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: ai: Azure Translator: Improving Translation Quality with Adaptive Datasets and Few‑Shot Learning
item.description:
Azure Translator now supports adaptive translation to improve domain-specific output using a small set of examples, without training a model. The post focuses on creating an adaptive dataset and using few-shot learning for terminology-sensitive translations.

  • Source: Microsoft AI Foundry Blog
